title: Switch Case Clauses Length
description: Each switch case clause should not contain too many lines of code to maintain readability. Excessive lines of code in a single case clause can make the control flow statement difficult to understand.
recommendation: Extract the content of large case clauses into dedicated methods.
impact: Improves code readability and maintainability by simplifying control flow statements.

checks.message: Extract the content of large case clauses into dedicated methods.
